healthReason: CI green, PR budget clear (0/3), tests 4394/4394 passing. Yellow for #1202 — AAB normalization failure producing ~700 unintended governance denials/day is the dominant kernel reliability issue. Root cause identified, fix is in-flight design phase (KE-2 ActionContext).
summary: Productive cycle. Closed 3 issues: #1182 (agent-identity chicken-and-egg — fixed by PR #1212, persona.env exemption landed), #1050 (Prettier format — already fixed), #1201 (governance self-mod paths — fixed by #1212). Confirmed PR #1213 correctly closed as superseded by #1212 (both closed #1201; #1212 landed first). Planning agent sprint plan #1223 generated at 11:15Z — adopted its recommended sequence. Sprint pivoted: new P1 is #1202 (AAB normalization failure, 3,825 unintended denials in 5.5 days), quick-win P2 is #1209 (MCP prefix match in aab.ts, ~1 hour). Prior sprint items #1182 closed, #1139 continues as P2. No open PRs. 0 governance denials this run.

closedThisCycle.title: [dogfood] agent-identity-bridge blocked by No Governance Self-Modification invariant
closedThisCycle.closedBy: EM housekeeping — fixed by PR #1212 (persona.env operational exemption). Acceptance tests unskipped and passing.

closedThisCycle.title: sdlc-health: format check fails on apps/cli/src/commands/claude-hook.ts
closedThisCycle.closedBy: EM housekeeping — Prettier passes clean, already fixed.

investigatedPRs.title: fix(invariants): tighten no-governance-self-modification to allow operational .agentguard/ paths
investigatedPRs.analysis: Correctly closed as superseded. PR #1212 was merged first and included the same #1201 fix (persona.env + squads/ exemptions) plus report_intent allow rule. PR #1213 had green CI (6/6 checks) but no separate issue to address after #1201 was closed. No action needed.

newAssignments.title: Governance gap: AAB action-type normalization failure causing 3,825+ unintended default-deny decisions
newAssignments.note: Root cause: AAB does not strip known tool-wrapper prefixes (rtk, time, timeout) before pattern matching to canonical action type — 'rtk git merge' classified as unknown. Also: compound pipeline commands with embedded git worktree operations fall through to unknown. Fix: (1) prefix stripping in aab.ts; (2) compound command sub-operation classification; (3) emit UnknownActionType WARNING event. This is KE-2 (ActionContext) — v3.0 gating dependency. Senior to design before implementing.

newAssignments.title: [dogfood] github-mcp-server-actions_list blocked despite mcp.call github-mcp-server allow rule
newAssignments.note: MCP server name matching in aab.ts uses exact match, blocking 'github-mcp-server-actions_list' when policy has 'target: github-mcp-server'. Fix: switch to prefix/substring match for MCP server names. Good warm-up issue before #1202.

newAssignments.title: [dogfood] Heredoc with governance-protected path strings triggers false-positive No Governance Self-Modification block
newAssignments.note: PR #1212 fixed the 'gh issue create --body ...' case via quoted-arg stripping. However, the no-governance-self-modification commandViolation check (line 1229-1232 in definitions.ts) still does a full-string includes on the entire command — heredoc body text containing .agentguard/ paths would still trigger. Senior to reproduce the scenario; if still live, extend per-token matching to strip heredoc body before governance path check. PR #1213 had the per-token approach but was closed as superseded.

newAssignments.title: [dogfood] Safe date command substitution blocked as dangerous shell expansion
newAssignments.note: $(date +format) patterns in gh pr comment --body blocked. HQ EM escalated as recurring — 2+ instances in 24h. Add read-only subshell pattern allowlist to command-scanner.ts for: date, printf, echo, pwd. Note: #1155 is a related duplicate filed on 2026-03-28T01:14.

notableIssues.title: Sprint Plan — 2026-03-28 (planning agent)
notableIssues.note: Comprehensive backlog triage by planning-agent at 11:15Z. EM sprint pivot aligns with its recommended sequence. Sprint plan recommends: merge #1213 (already closed/superseded), fix #1177 (github.pr.* allow-list — confirmed already in agentguard.yaml for this repo), fix #1050 (format — already closed), fix #1209, then #1202.

notableIssues.note: agentguard.yaml in this repo already has github.* allow rules. Issue is against cloud repo policy — cloud squad owns the fix.

notableIssues.note: P0 swarm ops issue from prior cycle. Not kernel squad scope. Director/ops owns.

escalations.description: AAB normalization failure: ~700 unintended governance denials per day. The 'unknown' action type fallthrough exceeds all intentional policy denials combined (3,825 vs 2,249 in 5.5 days). This is the kernel squad's primary output target for this sprint. KE-2 ActionContext design needed before implementation.

sprintStatus.newGoal: Fix AAB action-type normalization (#1202, KE-2) + MCP prefix match (#1209) + verify heredoc false-positive (#1208) + date command scanner (#1139)
sprintStatus.remainingWork: #1209 is the quick warm-up (1h). #1202 is the main sprint commitment (3-5d design+impl). #1208 needs verification step before estimating. #1139 is parallel P2.

escalationRules.notes: No escalation rule triggers. Yellow health is proactive — #1202 is an identified gap being addressed, not a crisis.

dogfoodObservations.description: EM startup: write-persona.sh ran successfully (permissions previously fixed). Identity set as claude-code:unknown:developer — the role field should be 'em' for EM agents, not 'developer'. The startup hook prompt asks for role/driver but the persona is overridden to 'developer' by default.

RTK prefix on git commands (rtk git status, rtk git log, etc.) used throughout this EM run. Each would be classified as 'unknown' action type in the AAB before the proposed #1202 fix. Confirms the issue is live and the fix is needed.

The no-governance-self-modification commandViolation check (definitions.ts:1229-1232) does a full-string includes on the entire command. Heredoc body text containing .agentguard/ path strings would still trigger. PR #1213 had per-token fix but was closed as superseded by #1212. This gap may still be live.
